the_zenith_sword.item.attack_mode.toolti: right click(with Ctrl) the item in the inventory to change the attack mode.
the_zenith_sword.item.attack_player_mode: right click(with Shift) the item in the inventory to change whether to hurt player
the_zenith_sword.item.distance.tooltip_p: right click the item in the inventory to change the default targeting range.
default targeting range for the current item
the_zenith_sword.configuration.block_int: When holding a Zenith Sword, right-click interactions (except for attacks) will be blocked
the_zenith_sword.configuration.enable_at: whether to attack item or xp orb in "all" mode
the_zenith_sword.configuration.enable_by: use damage type that bypasses most damage reduction
the_zenith_sword.configuration.enable_te: When Confluence:Otherworld is installed, significantly increase Zenith Sword attack power
the_zenith_sword.configuration.ensured_d: minimum damage ratio for non-player (0.0-1.0), damage will be raised to this ratio of original damage if lower
minimum damage ratio for player (0.0-1.0), damage will be raised to this ratio of original damage if lower
